figures.caption: Fig. 2. Snapshots from self-learning session: ‘Chat’ tab shows the conversational AI interface (MuDoC and TexDoC). ‘Objectives’ tab contains the learning objectives with checkboxes to track progress. ‘Document’ tab shows the source document for all AI systems. A ‘Notepad’ box is present on the right for note-taking.
Fig. 3. Perceived Learning Experience with MuDoC, TexDoC and DocSearch.
